items.summary: A massive international study could upend 40 years of heart attack treatment. items.summary: Scientists have uncovered a surprising twist in how cells behave when division goes wrong. items.title: Scientists supercharge natural killer cells to fight aggressive cancers

items.title: Scientists discover hidden liver switch that cuts harmful cholesterol
